title: teramnus oxyphyllus
intro: Teramnus oxyphyllus, also known as Hogpea or Katukar, is a tropical climbing legume plant native to tropical Asia and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is rich in health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, including respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. The herbal preparations of Teramnus oxyphyllus can be found in various forms, including teas, decoctions, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
